metadata.section_heading: Variant B -- Product Launch / Landing Page

content:
> Multi-property browsing layout for a real estate portal

**Page: Property Search Results (e.g., "99acres -- Flats in Thane West")**

1. **titlebar** -- Portal logo, nav (Buy, Rent, Projects, Agents, Home Loans, Post Property), search bar, "Post Free Ad" button.

2. **layout-row (Hero)** -- **heading** ("Flats for Sale in Thane West"), **paragraph** ("2,450 properties found | Starting from INR 45 Lakh"), **layout-row** with **counter-up** + **caption**: "2450" / "Properties", "85" / "Projects", "40" / "Builders".

3. **layout-row (Filter Bar)** -- **layout-row** with filters: **dropdown** (BHK: 1 / 2 / 3 / 4+), **dropdown** (Budget: Under 50L / 50L-1Cr / 1-2Cr / 2-3Cr / 3Cr+), **dropdown** (Status: Ready / Under Construction / New Launch), **dropdown** (Area: 500-750 / 750-1000 / 1000-1500 / 1500+ sq.ft.), **dropdown** (Sort By: Price Low-High / Price High-Low / Newest / Relevance), **button** ("Search").

4. **layout-row (Featured Projects)** -- **eyebrow** ("Featured"), **heading** ("Premium Projects in Thane West"). **columnsgrid** (3 columns) each card: **image** (project render), **badge** ("Featured" / "RERA Verified" / "Ready to Move"), **heading** (project name), **caption** (builder name), **paragraph** (configuration range + price range), **rating** (livability score), **button** ("View Details"), **button** ("Get Quote").

5. **layout-row (Resale Properties)** -- **eyebrow** ("Resale"), **heading** ("Owner-Listed Properties"). Same card pattern but with owner listing details: **image** (flat photos), **heading** (description -- "3 BHK in Hiranandani Estate"), **caption** (area + floor + age), **heading** (price), **badge** ("Owner" / "Broker"), **button** ("Contact"), **button** ("View Photos").

6. **layout-row (Under Construction)** -- **eyebrow** ("Upcoming"), **heading** ("Under-Construction Projects"). Same card pattern with possession date and **progress-bar** (construction progress).

7. **layout-row (Comparison Tool)** -- **heading** ("Compare Properties"). **columnsgrid** (3 columns) each with **dropdown** (select property). Comparison rows: Price, Carpet Area, Configuration, Floor, Possession, Builder Rating, Amenities Count, Locality Score.

8. **layout-row (Price Trend)** -- **heading** ("Thane West Price Trends"), **paragraph** ("Average price: INR 12,500/sq.ft. | 5-year growth: 38%"), **image** (price trend chart placeholder), **counter-up** + **caption**: "12500" / "INR Avg. Price/sq.ft.", "38" / "% 5-Year Growth".

9. **layout-row (Home Loan CTA)** -- **heading** ("Get Pre-Approved for a Home Loan"), **paragraph** ("Compare rates from 15+ banks"), **form** with **textbox** (Loan Amount), **dropdown** (Employment Type), **button** ("Check Eligibility"). **ticker** scrolling bank logos and rates.

10. **layout-row (Footer)** -- Full footer with popular searches, localities, tools (EMI, stamp duty, legal), company info, social links, legal disclaimers, RERA compliance notice.

metadata.section_heading: Variant C -- Product Catalog / Comparison Page

content:
# Solar & Green Tech -- Product Pages

> Focus: Savings-driven technical storytelling with trackable sections for panel efficiency, system sizing, ROI calculators, and installation processes that let solar companies measure which financial projections and environmental impact details convert browsers into site survey bookings and system purchases.
context_header: # Source: product_45_solar_green_tech.md | Section: Introduction
content_with_context:
# Source: product_45_solar_green_tech.md | Section: Introduction
# Solar & Green Tech -- Product Pages

> Focus: Savings-driven technical storytelling with trackable sections for panel efficiency, system sizing, ROI calculators, and installation processes that let solar companies measure which financial projections and environmental impact details convert browsers into site survey bookings and system purchases.

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Tesla Solar | tesla.com/energy/design | Interactive system designer hero with address-based solar estimate, roof tile visualization, Powerwall battery pairing, monthly savings counter, utility bill offset percentage, order flow with deposit CTA |
| Tata Power Solar | tatapowersolar.com/residential | Savings calculator hero with electricity bill input, panel efficiency comparison chart, step-by-step installation timeline, government subsidy information, EMI options, customer testimonial video grid |
| Luminous Solar | luminoussolar.com/rooftop | ROI calculator with payback period visualization, panel wattage selector, inverter pairing guide, warranty comparison table, "Book Free Site Survey" prominent CTA, dealer locator map |
| Havells Solar | havells.com/solar-rooftop | Product range hero with panel efficiency badges, system size recommendation based on bill amount, net metering explanation, installation process steps, 25-year performance warranty, download datasheet CTA |
| SunPower Maxeon | sunpower.com/solar-panels | Industry-leading efficiency hero (22.8%), degradation rate comparison, shade performance advantage, complete home solar system packages, monitoring app showcase, financing options breakdown |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Savings calculator hero where users input their electricity bill to see estimated savings
- Panel efficiency and wattage specifications with competitive comparison
- System size recommendation based on consumption and roof area
- Monthly/annual savings projection with payback period counter
- Step-by-step installation process timeline with duration estimates
- Battery storage options with backup duration calculator
- Government subsidy and incentive information by region
- Warranty details emphasizing 25-year performance guarantees
- ROI timeline visualization showing cumulative savings over decades
- Monitoring app showcase with real-time generation data
- Environmental impact counter (CO2 offset, trees equivalent)
- "Book Free Site Survey" or "Get Custom Quote" conversion CTA

---

content:
> Each feature section = separate layout-row = unique component ID = individually trackable

**Page: Solar System Product Detail (e.g., Tata Power Solar -- 5kW Rooftop Solar System)**

1. **titlebar**
   Brand logo, nav links (Residential, Commercial, Products, Calculator, About, Contact), hamburger for mobile, "Get Free Quote" button.

2. **layout-row (Hero -- System Overview + Key Info)** -> `comp_0_components_1`
   Left column: **carousel** (6 shots -- installed rooftop system aerial view, panel close-up showing cell pattern, inverter wall mount, monitoring app screenshot, installation team at work, happy homeowner with panels on roof). Right column: **eyebrow** ("Residential | Grid-Tied"), **heading** ("5kW Rooftop Solar System"), **paragraph** ("Power your home with clean, free energy from the sun. A 5kW system covers the average 3-4 BHK household's electricity needs and pays for itself within 4-5 years."), **badge** ("BIS Certified"), **badge** ("Govt. Subsidy Eligible"), **rating** (4.6 stars, "2,100 Reviews"), **heading** ("INR 2,85,000*"), **caption** ("*Before government subsidy. After subsidy: ~INR 2,07,000"), **button** ("Get Free Site Survey"), **button** ("Calculate Your Savings"), **link** ("Download Datasheet").

3. **layout-row (Feature 1: Panel Efficiency & Wattage)** -> `comp_0_components_2`
   Left column: **image** (solar panel close-up showing monocrystalline PERC cell structure with half-cut technology visible). Right column: **eyebrow** ("Panel Technology"), **heading** ("High-Efficiency Mono PERC Panels"), **paragraph** ("Each panel in your 5kW system uses monocrystalline PERC (Passivated Emitter and Rear Cell) technology with half-cut cell design. This delivers up to 21.5% conversion efficiency -- extracting more energy from every square meter of roof space."). **columnsgrid** (3 columns) each with **counter-up** + **caption**: "21.5" / "% Panel Efficiency", "545" / "W Per Panel", "10" / "Panels in 5kW System". **accordion** with items: "Cell Technology (Mono PERC Half-Cut, 144 cells per panel)", "Panel Dimensions (2278 x 1134 x 35mm, 27.5 kg each)", "Temperature Coefficient (-0.34%/C -- minimal heat loss)", "Low-Light Performance (Generates power even on cloudy days)". **badge** ("Tier-1 Manufacturer").

4. **layout-row (Feature 2: System Size & Coverage)** -> `comp_0_components_3`
   Left column: **eyebrow** ("System Sizing"), **heading** ("Right-Sized for Your Home"), **paragraph** ("A 5kW system generates approximately 20-25 units (kWh) of electricity per day, enough to offset the complete electricity consumption of a typical 3-4 BHK household with AC, refrigerator, washing machine, and standard appliances."). Right column: **columnsgrid** (2 columns): Column 1 -- **heading** ("Daily Generation") + **counter-up** ("22") + **caption** ("kWh average daily output") + **paragraph** ("Based on 4.5 peak sun hours/day in most Indian metros"); Column 2 -- **heading** ("Monthly Generation") + **counter-up** ("660") + **caption** ("kWh average monthly output") + **paragraph** ("Equivalent to INR 5,000-6,000 electricity bill offset"). **paragraph** ("Roof area required: approximately 350 sq.ft. of shadow-free space. East-West or South-facing roofs preferred."). **image** (roof area illustration showing panel placement on a typical terrace).

5. **layout-row (Feature 3: Savings Calculator)** -> `comp_0_components_4`
   **eyebrow** ("Your Savings"), **heading** ("Calculate How Much You'll Save"). **form** with **textbox** (Monthly Electricity Bill in INR -- placeholder "e.g., 5000"), **dropdown** (City: Mumbai / Delhi / Bangalore / Chennai / Hyderabad / Pune / Kolkata / Other), **dropdown** (Roof Type: RCC Flat / Sloped Tile / Metal Sheet), **button** ("Calculate Savings"). **columnsgrid** (3 columns) with **counter-up** + **caption** (example output): "5200" / "INR Monthly Savings*", "6.24" / "Lakh Savings Over 25 Years*", "4.5" / "Years Payback Period*". **paragraph** ("*Estimates based on average solar irradiance for your city, current electricity tariff, and 0.5% annual panel degradation. Actual results may vary."). **progress-bar** labeled "Bill Offset" at 90%.

6. **layout-row (Feature 4: Installation Process)** -> `comp_0_components_5`
   **eyebrow** ("Installation"), **heading** ("From Survey to Switch-On in 7 Days"). **columnsgrid** (4 columns) each with **counter-up** (day number) + **heading** (step name) + **caption** (description): "Day 1" / "Free Site Survey" / "Our engineer visits your home to assess roof structure, shadow analysis, and electrical capacity", "Day 2-3" / "Design & Approvals" / "Custom system design, net metering application, and DISCOM approval submission", "Day 4-6" / "Installation" / "Panel mounting, inverter installation, wiring, and earthing by certified technicians", "Day 7" / "Commissioning" / "System testing, net meter installation, monitoring app setup, and handover". **video** (timelapse of a rooftop installation from bare roof to operational system). **paragraph** ("All installations performed by MNRE-certified technicians with zero roof penetration mounting systems. No structural damage to your terrace."). **badge** ("7-Day Installation Guarantee").

7. **layout-row (Feature 5: Battery Storage)** -> `comp_0_components_6`
   Left column: **image** (wall-mounted lithium battery storage unit in a home utility room). Right column: **eyebrow** ("Battery Backup"), **heading** ("Add Energy Storage"), **paragraph** ("Pair your solar system with a lithium-ion battery bank to store excess daytime generation for evening and nighttime use. Essential for areas with frequent power cuts or for maximizing self-consumption."). **columnsgrid** (3 columns) each with **heading** + **caption**: "5 kWh Battery" / "INR 1,80,000 -- 4-6 hours backup for essentials (lights, fans, WiFi, fridge)" + **button** ("Add"), "10 kWh Battery" / "INR 3,20,000 -- 8-10 hours backup including AC and heavy loads" + **button** ("Add"), "No Battery" / "INR 0 -- Grid-tied only, use net metering credits for night consumption" + **button** ("Selected"). **paragraph** ("Battery adds 3-5 years to the payback period but provides energy independence during outages."). **badge** ("10-Year Battery Warranty").

   Left column: **image** (PM Surya Ghar scheme logo / government solar promotion visual). 10. **layout-row (Feature 8: ROI Timeline)** -> `comp_0_components_9`
    **eyebrow** ("Return on Investment"), **heading** ("Your 25-Year Solar Journey"). **columnsgrid** (1 column, stacked timeline): **layout-row** with **badge** ("Year 0") + **paragraph** ("Investment: INR 2,07,000 (after subsidy). metadata.section_heading: Variant A -- Product Detail Page (Feature-Per-Section Trackable)

content:
> Marketing-focused single-page layout for a new solar product or campaign launch

**Page: Product Launch (e.g., "Tesla Solar Roof -- Now Available in India")**

1. **titlebar** -- Brand logo, minimal nav (Solar Roof, How It Works, Savings, Order), "Order Now" button.

2. **layout-row (Hero)** -- Full-width **video-background** (cinematic drone footage zooming from a sun-drenched neighborhood to a single home with Tesla Solar Roof tiles -- indistinguishable from premium roofing, then pulling back to show the entire street going solar). Overlay: **eyebrow** ("The Invisible Solar Solution"), **heading** ("Tesla Solar Roof"), **paragraph** ("Every tile generates clean energy. No panels. No compromise."), **button** ("Design Your Solar Roof"), **button** ("Calculate Savings").

3. **layout-row (The Technology)** -- Dark background. **heading** ("Solar, Reimagined"). **columnsgrid** (3 columns) with **counter-up** + **caption**: "72" / "W Per Tile", "25" / "Year Warranty", "3x" / "Stronger Than Standard Roofing". **paragraph** ("Tempered glass solar tiles replace your existing roof, generating electricity while providing superior weather protection."). **image** (close-up of solar tile showing the texture that makes it look like a traditional roof tile).

4. **layout-row (Savings Promise)** -- **heading** ("Lower Your Bills. Raise Your Home Value."), **columnsgrid** (2 columns): Left -- **counter-up** stats: "60" / "% Average Bill Reduction", "30" / "Year Expected Lifespan"; Right -- **image** (home value appreciation chart showing solar premium). **paragraph** ("Homes with solar sell for 4-6% more than comparable non-solar homes.").

5. **layout-row (Powerwall Integration)** -- **heading** ("Add Powerwall for Full Independence"), **image** (Powerwall unit mounted in garage), **paragraph** ("Store solar energy for nighttime use and power outage protection."), **columnsgrid** (2 columns) with **counter-up** + **caption**: "13.5" / "kWh Storage Per Powerwall", "7" / "Days Backup (Essential Loads)".

6. **layout-row (Installation)** -- **heading** ("Professional Installation"), **columnsgrid** (4 columns) timeline steps with **icon** + **heading** + **caption**: "Design" / "Custom roof design using satellite imagery", "Permits" / "We handle all local permits and approvals", "Install" / "1-2 week installation by Tesla-certified crew", "Power On" / "System activation and app monitoring setup".

7. **layout-row (Order CTA)** -- **heading** ("Design Your Solar Roof"), **paragraph** ("Enter your address to get a custom design and savings estimate"), **form** with **textbox** (Address), **button** ("Get Started"). **caption** ("USD 100 fully refundable deposit to reserve your order.").

8. **layout-row (Footer)** -- Minimal footer with Tesla Energy links, legal disclaimers, privacy policy.

---

metadata.section_heading: Variant B -- Product Launch / Landing Page

content:
> Multi-product browsing layout for a solar brand's full product range

**Page: Product Range (e.g., "Luminous Solar -- All Products")**

1. **titlebar** -- Brand logo, nav (Rooftop Solar, Panels, Inverters, Batteries, Accessories, Calculator), search, "Find Dealer" button.

2. **layout-row (Hero)** -- **heading** ("Solar Solutions for Every Need"), **paragraph** ("From residential rooftops to commercial installations, find the right solar system for your energy goals"), **image** (range of products -- panels, inverters, batteries arranged together). **button** ("Use Savings Calculator").

3. **layout-row (Category Selector)** -- **tabs** (By Application: "Home Rooftop", "Commercial", "Off-Grid", "Solar Water Heater") each filtering the product grid.

4. **layout-row (Category: Rooftop Systems)** -- **eyebrow** ("Complete Systems"), **heading** ("Rooftop Solar Packages"). **columnsgrid** (3 columns) each card: **image** (system on roof), **badge** ("Bestseller" / "Subsidy Eligible" / "New"), **heading** (system size), **caption** (ideal for + monthly savings estimate), **paragraph** (key specs -- panel count, inverter, warranty), **counter-up** + **caption** (monthly savings), **button** ("Get Quote"), **button** ("Compare").

5. **layout-row (Category: Solar Panels)** -- Same card pattern. **eyebrow** ("Panels"), **heading** ("High-Efficiency Solar Panels"). Cards show wattage, efficiency, dimensions.

6. **layout-row (Category: Inverters & Batteries)** -- Same card pattern. **eyebrow** ("Power Electronics"), **heading** ("Inverters & Storage").

7. **layout-row (Comparison Tool)** -- **heading** ("Compare Systems Side by Side"). **columnsgrid** (3 columns) each with **dropdown** (select system). Comparison rows: System Size, Panel Count, Panel Efficiency, Inverter Type, Battery Option, Monthly Savings, Payback Period, Warranty, Price Before Subsidy, Price After Subsidy.

8. **layout-row (Subsidy Guide)** -- **heading** ("Government Subsidy Guide"), **paragraph** ("Check your eligibility and estimated subsidy amount"), **columnsgrid** (3 columns) with system size tiers and subsidy amounts, **button** ("Check Eligibility"). **link** ("Read Complete Subsidy FAQ").

9. **layout-row (Free Survey CTA)** -- **heading** ("Get a Free Site Survey"), **paragraph** ("Our solar engineers will assess your roof, design your system, and provide a detailed savings report -- absolutely free"), **form** with **textbox** (Name), **textbox** (Phone), **textbox** (Pincode), **dropdown** (Monthly Bill Range), **button** ("Book Free Survey"). **counter-up** + **caption**: "100000" / "Free Surveys Completed".

10. **layout-row (Footer)** -- Full footer with product categories, resources (calculator, subsidy guide, FAQ, blog), company info, dealer network, social links, legal. **caption** ("BIS Certified | MNRE Channel Partner | 25-Year Performance Warranty").

1. **titlebar** -- Brand logo, nav (Rooftop Solar, Panels, Inverters, Batteries, Accessories, Calculator), search, "Find Dealer" button.

2. **layout-row (Hero)** -- **heading** ("Solar Solutions for Every Need"), **paragraph** ("From residential rooftops to commercial installations, find the right solar system for your energy goals"), **image** (range of products -- panels, inverters, batteries arranged together). **button** ("Use Savings Calculator").

3. **layout-row (Category Selector)** -- **tabs** (By Application: "Home Rooftop", "Commercial", "Off-Grid", "Solar Water Heater") each filtering the product grid.

4. **layout-row (Category: Rooftop Systems)** -- **eyebrow** ("Complete Systems"), **heading** ("Rooftop Solar Packages"). **columnsgrid** (3 columns) each card: **image** (system on roof), **badge** ("Bestseller" / "Subsidy Eligible" / "New"), **heading** (system size), **caption** (ideal for + monthly savings estimate), **paragraph** (key specs -- panel count, inverter, warranty), **counter-up** + **caption** (monthly savings), **button** ("Get Quote"), **button** ("Compare").

5. **layout-row (Category: Solar Panels)** -- Same card pattern. **eyebrow** ("Panels"), **heading** ("High-Efficiency Solar Panels"). Cards show wattage, efficiency, dimensions.

6. **layout-row (Category: Inverters & Batteries)** -- Same card pattern. **eyebrow** ("Power Electronics"), **heading** ("Inverters & Storage").

7. **layout-row (Comparison Tool)** -- **heading** ("Compare Systems Side by Side"). **columnsgrid** (3 columns) each with **dropdown** (select system). Comparison rows: System Size, Panel Count, Panel Efficiency, Inverter Type, Battery Option, Monthly Savings, Payback Period, Warranty, Price Before Subsidy, Price After Subsidy.

8. **layout-row (Subsidy Guide)** -- **heading** ("Government Subsidy Guide"), **paragraph** ("Check your eligibility and estimated subsidy amount"), **columnsgrid** (3 columns) with system size tiers and subsidy amounts, **button** ("Check Eligibility"). **link** ("Read Complete Subsidy FAQ").

9. **layout-row (Free Survey CTA)** -- **heading** ("Get a Free Site Survey"), **paragraph** ("Our solar engineers will assess your roof, design your system, and provide a detailed savings report -- absolutely free"), **form** with **textbox** (Name), **textbox** (Phone), **textbox** (Pincode), **dropdown** (Monthly Bill Range), **button** ("Book Free Survey"). **counter-up** + **caption**: "100000" / "Free Surveys Completed".

10. **layout-row (Footer)** -- Full footer with product categories, resources (calculator, subsidy guide, FAQ, blog), company info, dealer network, social links, legal. **caption** ("BIS Certified | MNRE Channel Partner | 25-Year Performance Warranty").

3. **br (divider)**
   Visual separator.

   Each: icon + heading + caption. Power Tools, Plumbing, Electrical, Paint & Stain, Lumber & Building, Lawn & Garden, Hardware & Fasteners, Safety & Work Wear.

   "30+ Years Serving the Community", "50,000+ Products", "Same-Day Pickup", "Free Project Advice".

    textbox (name), textbox (phone), textbox (email), dropdown (department), textarea (question or item needed), button.

content:

| Apollo 24\|7 | apollo247.com | Search-first hero, doctor profiles with ratings |
| Apollo Clinic | apolloclinic.com | Clinic locator, health check packages with pricing |
| Clove Dental | clovedental.in | Inline appointment form in hero, before/after gallery, transparent pricing |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Inline appointment form in hero section reduces friction
- Before/After gallery uniquely powerful for dental/cosmetic
- FAQ accordion addresses patient objections on homepage
- Doctor credentials + ratings build credibility
- Clinic locator critical for multi-location businesses
- Health check packages with transparent pricing

content:
**Page: Home (Single Page)**

1. **titlebar**
   Clinic name/logo, nav links (Services, About, Book, Contact), phone number CTA button.

2. **layout-row (Hero Split)**
   Left column: heading + paragraph (clinic tagline, "Compassionate care for your family"), button ("Book Appointment"). Right column: image of doctor/clinic.

3. **br (divider)**
   Subtle line separating hero from services.

4. **columnsgrid (Services Grid — 3 columns)**
   Each column: icon + heading + paragraph. Services like General Checkup, Pediatrics, Dermatology, Women's Health, Lab Tests, Vaccinations.

5. **layout-row (About the Doctor)**
   Left: image (doctor portrait). Right: heading + paragraph (credentials, experience, philosophy), badge ("15+ Years Experience").

6. **accordion (FAQs)**
   Common patient questions: insurance accepted, walk-in vs appointment, clinic hours, what to bring.

7. **counter-up (Trust Stats Row)**
   layout-row with 3-4 counter-ups: "10,000+ Patients Treated", "15+ Years Experience", "4.8 Star Rating", "98% Satisfaction".

8. **carousel (Patient Testimonials)**
   Slides with blockquote + paragraph (patient reviews), rating stars.

9. **columnsgrid (Insurance Partners)**
   Logo images of accepted insurance providers in a 4-6 column grid.

10. **layout-row (Book Appointment CTA)**
    heading + paragraph + button ("Schedule Your Visit Today").

11. **layout-row (Footer)**
    3 columns: clinic address + map link, operating hours, phone/email/social links.

   Scrolling testimonial cards with rating + blockquote.

9. **progress-bar (Patient Satisfaction Metrics)**
   Multiple bars: "Overall Satisfaction 96%", "Wait Time <15 min 88%", "Would Recommend 94%".

10. **layout-row (Newsletter + Contact)**
    Left: heading + paragraph + form (email + button for health tips newsletter). Right: address, phone, hours, map link.

content:

   Left: eyebrow ("Expert Home Tutoring") + heading + paragraph (subjects taught, teaching approach), button ("Book Free Trial Class"). Right: image (tutor teaching).

   Decorative wave transition from hero to stats section.

4. **counter-up (Results Row)**
   layout-row: "500+ Students Taught", "95% Score Improvement", "8+ Years Experience", "4.9 Rating".

   Each: icon + heading + caption. Math, Science, English, Social Studies, Computer Science, etc.

   Tabs: Primary (1-5), Middle School (6-8), High School (9-10), Board Exam Prep (11-12). Each: paragraph describing curriculum focus + button.

   Left: image/gif (whiteboard/teaching). Right: heading + accordion with items: Personalized Approach, Regular Assessments, Parent Updates, Doubt Clearing Sessions.

   Slides: blockquote + paragraph + caption (parent name, student grade).

   textbox (parent name), textbox (phone), dropdown (subject), dropdown (class/grade), calendar (preferred date), button.

11. **layout-row (Footer)**
    Contact info, areas served, social links.

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |

| Indian Accent | indianaccent.com | Minimal elegant design, chef spotlight, awards, full-screen hero |
| Bombay Canteen | thebombaycanteen.com | Storytelling-first, Instagram integration, private dining |
| Dhamaka NYC | dhamaka.nyc | Dramatic food photography, reservation as single CTA, press quotes |

- Reservation is the single most prominent CTA for restaurants
- Photography dominates over text for premium dining
- Chef spotlight positions food as art

content:
# Events — Function Halls / Banquets

> Focus: High Value / Low Frequency
context_header: # Source: 05_events_venues.md | Section: Introduction
content_with_context:
# Source: 05_events_venues.md | Section: Introduction
# Events — Function Halls / Banquets

> Focus: High Value / Low Frequency

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Jade Banquets | jadebanquets.in | Aspirational luxury imagery, venue capacity cards, enquiry form |
| Jaypee Hotels | jaypeehotels.com | Multi-property cards, package pricing, 360° virtual tour |
| WedMeGood | wedmegood.com | Search-first marketplace, real wedding stories, vendor ratings |
| The Oberoi | oberoihotels.com | Ultra-minimal luxury, cinematic photography, floor plans |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Enquiry form is primary CTA (not online booking — high-touch sales)
- Venue capacity info on cards helps visitors self-qualify
- Virtual tour / 360° embed reduces need for physical visit
- Gallery is crucial — visitors envision their event
- Event type segmentation: Weddings, Corporate, Social

---
context_header: # Source: 05_events_venues.md | Section: Real Website Examples & Key Insights
content_with_context:
# Source: 05_events_venues.md | Section: Real Website Examples & Key Insights
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Jade Banquets | jadebanquets.in | Aspirational luxury imagery, venue capacity cards, enquiry form |
| Jaypee Hotels | jaypeehotels.com | Multi-property cards, package pricing, 360° virtual tour |
| WedMeGood | wedmegood.com | Search-first marketplace, real wedding stories, vendor ratings |
| The Oberoi | oberoihotels.com | Ultra-minimal luxury, cinematic photography, floor plans |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Enquiry form is primary CTA (not online booking — high-touch sales)
- Venue capacity info on cards helps visitors self-qualify
- Virtual tour / 360° embed reduces need for physical visit
- Gallery is crucial — visitors envision their event
- Event type segmentation: Weddings, Corporate, Social

---

content:
**Page: Home (Single Page)**

1. **titlebar**
   Venue name/logo, nav (Halls, Events, Gallery, Pricing, Contact), button ("Check Availability").

2. **carousel (Hero — Venue Showcase)**
   Full-width slides: decorated hall for different events (wedding, reception, corporate), overlay heading + caption (event type) + button ("Book This Hall").

3. **counter-up (Venue Stats)**
   "500+ Events Hosted", "3 Elegant Halls", "Up to 1000 Guests", "15+ Years of Service".

4. **tabs (Our Halls)**
   Tab per hall: image gallery + heading + paragraph (capacity, dimensions, amenities) + badge ("Most Popular") + button ("Enquire").

5. **columnsgrid (Event Types — 3 columns)**
   Each: image + heading + caption. Weddings, Receptions, Corporate Events, Birthday Parties, Engagements, Religious Ceremonies.

6. **layout-row (Amenities)**
   heading + columnsgrid (4 cols): icon + caption. AC, Parking, Catering, DJ/Sound, Decoration, Valet, Bridal Room, Generator Backup.

7. **layout-row (Catering Packages)**
   3 cards: heading + paragraph (menu highlights) + counter-up (price per plate) + button ("View Full Menu").

8. **carousel (Past Events Gallery)**
   High-quality photos of decorated venues, happy clients.

9. **ticker (Client Testimonials)**
   Scrolling review cards: rating + blockquote + caption (event type, date).

10. **layout-row (Virtual Tour CTA)**
    image/video thumbnail + heading + paragraph + button ("Take a Virtual Tour").

11. **form (Enquiry / Check Availability)**
    textbox (name), textbox (phone), dropdown (event type), calendar (event date), textbox (guest count), dropdown (preferred hall), textarea (special requirements), button.

12. **layout-row (Footer)**
    Address with map link, phone numbers, email, social links, cancellation policy link.

   Visual separator between hero and content sections.

   Each: icon + heading + paragraph + button. General Pest Control, Termite Treatment, Bed Bug Treatment, Mosquito Fogging, Rodent Control, Commercial Fumigation.

   Tab 1 — Residential: services, pricing tiers, warranty info. Tab 2 — Commercial: industries served (restaurants, warehouses, offices), compliance.

7. **layout-row (Our Process)**
   4-step: icon + heading + caption. "Free Inspection" → "Custom Treatment Plan" → "Safe Application" → "Follow-Up & Warranty".

    Safety of chemicals, pet-friendly options, how long treatment takes, warranty terms, preparation before treatment.

    Phone, WhatsApp, areas served, license number, safety certifications.

| Rajput Jain & Assoc. | carajput.com | Online service delivery, client login portal |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Conservative navy/gold palette signals professionalism
- Thought leadership content (publications, blog, insights)
- Partner/team profiles with detailed credentials
- Awards and directory rankings displayed
- Tax calendar and calculators as value-add tools
- Legal disclaimers in footer mandatory

   Left: eyebrow ("Trusted Financial Partners") + heading ("Expert Tax & Accounting Solutions") + paragraph (brief firm positioning) + button ("Schedule Free Consultation"). Right: image (professional office/team).

   Visual separator between hero and content sections.

   "15+ Years Experience", "2,000+ Clients Served", "₹500 Cr+ Tax Saved", "100% Compliance Rate".

   image (founder/team) + heading + paragraph (credentials, memberships — ICAI) + badge ("ICAI Registered").

content:
# Beauty & Wellness — Salons / Spas / Parlours

> Focus: Repeat Bookings
context_header: # Source: 11_beauty_wellness.md | Section: Introduction
content_with_context:
# Source: 11_beauty_wellness.md | Section: Introduction
# Beauty & Wellness — Salons / Spas / Parlours

> Focus: Repeat Bookings

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Lakme Salon | https://www.lakmesalon.in/ | Brand-first aesthetic, appointment booking as primary CTA, before/after transformations, store locator for franchise chain |
| Studieo7 Salon | https://studieo7.in/ | Technology differentiator (Metaverse), franchise promotion on homepage, Google reviews integration |
| Looks Salon | https://www.lookssalon.in/ | Chain model with 162+ branch count as proof, salon locator critical, franchise recruitment, celebrity clientele |
| Akasa Wellness | https://www.akasa.in/ | Luxury spa with earth tones, membership tiers, gift card promotion, treatment pricing transparency, Ayurveda integration |
| Sohum Spas | https://sohumspas.com/ | Location-centric with multiple cities, premium calm aesthetic, membership/loyalty programs |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Appointment booking CTA should be prominent and repeated throughout the page
- Before/after transformation galleries are the primary social proof for salons
- Serene/calming aesthetics for spas (earth tones, minimal) vs high-fashion for salons
- Store/salon locator is critical for chain businesses
- Franchise recruitment section is common for salon chains
- Membership plans and gift cards are key revenue drivers for spas
- Treatment menus with transparent pricing build trust
- Celebrity endorsements and Google reviews integration

content_with_context:
# Source: 12_fitness.md | Section: Introduction
# Fitness — Gyms / Yoga Studios / CrossFit

> Focus: Retention & Habit

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Gold's Gym India | https://goldsgym.in/ | Bold black/gold palette, gym locator for 150+ locations, before/after transformation stories, franchise model, mobile app promotion |
| cult.fit | https://www.cult.fit/ | Platform/ecosystem (fitness + nutrition + mental health), app-centric, location-based, subscription tiers, vibrant youthful palette |
| Anytime Fitness India | https://www.anytimefitness.co.in/ | 24/7 access as defining feature, global network, no lock-in contract, key fob visual as brand icon, purple brand consistency |
| Habuild | https://habuild.in/ | Online yoga model, free trial as primary conversion, live class schedule display, community/habit messaging, video testimonials |
| FITPASS | https://fitpass.co.in/ | Aggregator model (12,000+ studios), AI trainer feature, per-day cost breakdown, corporate wellness channel |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- High-energy bold visual design (black, neon, vibrant colors) for gyms
- "Join Now" CTA repeated throughout the page
- Gym/center locator is critical functionality for chains
- Before/after transformation stories are the primary social proof
- Membership tier comparison (Free, Basic, Premium) drives decisions
- Mobile app promotion with QR codes and store badges
- Franchise opportunity sections for gym chains
- Class schedules and program grids for yoga/fitness studios
- Counter stats (members, locations, trainers, years) are universal

content:
# Real Estate — Brokers / Builders / PG/Hostels

> Focus: High Ticket / Trust
context_header: # Source: 13_real_estate.md | Section: Introduction
content_with_context:
# Source: 13_real_estate.md | Section: Introduction
# Real Estate — Brokers / Builders / PG/Hostels

> Focus: High Ticket / Trust

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Square Yards | https://www.squareyards.com | Search-first hero with filters (buy/rent, city, type, budget), city selector grid, data visualization (price heatmaps), app download push |
| Brick & Bolt | https://www.bricknbolt.com | Cost calculator as primary conversion tool, 4-step process visualization, package comparison cards, ESCROW trust signal, referral program |
| RealEstateIndia.com | https://www.realestateindia.com | Tabbed search (Buy/Rent/PG/Commercial), agent/builder directory, virtual tour listings, mega-footer SEO links |
| Grovy India | https://www.grovyindia.com | Luxury builder with high-res renders, simpler navigation, trust through establishment year (1985), enquiry form focus |
| CommonFloor | https://www.commonfloor.com | Locality guide with infrastructure scores, verified listing badges, statistics bar |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Search-first hero is universal for property portals (filters: city, type, budget, BHK)
- City-based navigation is essential for Indian real estate
- Trust signals: Verified badges, RERA numbers, builder credentials, counter stats
- Two-sided marketplace: Both property seekers and sellers/agents need CTAs
- Builders focus on visual quality (renders, galleries), establishment year, enquiry forms
- Heavy footer SEO with extensive locality and city links
- Cost calculators and EMI tools are powerful conversion tools
- Data visualization (price graphs, heatmaps) builds trust on portals

---
context_header: # Source: 13_real_estate.md | Section: Real Website Examples & Key Insights
content_with_context:
# Source: 13_real_estate.md | Section: Real Website Examples & Key Insights
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Square Yards | https://www.squareyards.com | Search-first hero with filters (buy/rent, city, type, budget), city selector grid, data visualization (price heatmaps), app download push |
| Brick & Bolt | https://www.bricknbolt.com | Cost calculator as primary conversion tool, 4-step process visualization, package comparison cards, ESCROW trust signal, referral program |
| RealEstateIndia.com | https://www.realestateindia.com | Tabbed search (Buy/Rent/PG/Commercial), agent/builder directory, virtual tour listings, mega-footer SEO links |
| Grovy India | https://www.grovyindia.com | Luxury builder with high-res renders, simpler navigation, trust through establishment year (1985), enquiry form focus |
| CommonFloor | https://www.commonfloor.com | Locality guide with infrastructure scores, verified listing badges, statistics bar |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Search-first hero is universal for property portals (filters: city, type, budget, BHK)
- City-based navigation is essential for Indian real estate
- Trust signals: Verified badges, RERA numbers, builder credentials, counter stats
- Two-sided marketplace: Both property seekers and sellers/agents need CTAs
- Builders focus on visual quality (renders, galleries), establishment year, enquiry forms
- Heavy footer SEO with extensive locality and city links
- Cost calculators and EMI tools are powerful conversion tools
- Data visualization (price graphs, heatmaps) builds trust on portals

---

content:
**Page 1: Home**

1. **titlebar**
   Agency name/logo, nav (Properties, Buy, Rent, About Us, Contact), button ("List Your Property").

2. **layout-row (Hero)**
   Full-width cityscape/property image, overlay: heading ("Find Your Dream Home") + form inline: dropdown (Buy/Rent), textbox (location), dropdown (property type), button ("Search").

3. **br (divider)**
   Visual separator between hero and content sections.

4. **counter-up (Agency Credibility)**
   "1,000+ Properties Sold", "500+ Happy Families", "15+ Years", "₹200 Cr+ Transactions".

5. **tabs (Featured Properties)**
   Tabs: For Sale, For Rent, New Projects, Commercial. Each: columnsgrid (3 cols) — image + heading (property name) + caption (location, BHK, sq ft) + counter-up (price) + button ("View Details").

6. **columnsgrid (Property Types — 4 columns)**
   Each: icon + heading + caption. Apartments, Villas, Plots, Commercial Spaces, PG/Hostels, Farmhouses.

7. **layout-row (Why Choose Us)**
   Left: heading + paragraph (expertise, local knowledge, end-to-end support). Right: columnsgrid: icon + caption. RERA Registered, Legal Verification, Loan Assistance, Site Visits.

8. **ticker (Builder Partners)**
   Scrolling builder/developer logos.

9. **layout-row (Recent Transactions)**
   carousel of sold/rented properties: image + badge ("Sold" / "Rented") + caption.

10. **carousel (Client Testimonials)**
   blockquote + rating + caption (buyer/seller, property type).

11. **form (Property Enquiry)**
    textbox (name), textbox (phone), dropdown (looking to: Buy/Rent/Sell), dropdown (property type), textbox (budget range), textbox (preferred location), button.

12. **layout-row (Footer)**
    Office address, RERA number, phone, email, social links.

**Page 2: Property Listing Detail**

1. **carousel (Property Gallery)**
   Multiple property images.

2. **layout-row (Details)**
   heading + badges (BHK, sq ft, floor) + paragraph (description) + columnsgrid (amenities: icon + caption).

3. **br (divider)**
   Visual separator between hero and content sections.

4. **form (Schedule Visit)**
   textbox (name), textbox (phone), calendar (visit date), button.

# Automotive — Garages / Car Wash / Detailing

> Focus: Convenience & Trust

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| The Detailing Mafia | https://www.thedetailingmafia.com | Dark premium aesthetic, brand partner logos (Labocosmetica, Nano Graphene), before/after gallery, franchise CTA, outlet locator |
| CarzSpa | https://www.carzspa.com | Proprietary product branding, franchise model, experience stats (since 2006), club/community engagement |
| Detailing Bull | https://detailingbull.com | Bike + car detailing, 23 locations as prominent stat, city-specific pages for local SEO |
| MyRaasta | https://myraasta.in | Vehicle selector (brand/model/fuel) as primary conversion, how-it-works steps, doorstep service, garage aggregator model |
| Detailing Dons | https://www.detailingdons.com | Pricing transparency with tiered packages, interactive before/after slider, franchise as growth model |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Dark premium aesthetic with high-contrast imagery is industry standard for detailing
- Before/after galleries are the primary trust and conversion tool
- Service-based pricing cards with tier comparison drive decisions
- Franchise model is extremely common for detailing chains
- Brand partner logos (coating brands) build technical credibility
- Vehicle selector/form is the primary conversion tool for repair platforms
- Counter stats (cars serviced, locations, years) are universal
- Multi-location outlet locator is essential for chains

   Left: heading ("Expert Car Care You Can Trust") + paragraph (all makes & models, certified mechanics) + two buttons ("Book a Service", "Call Now"). Right: image (mechanic working on car).

3. **br (divider)**
   Visual separator between hero and content sections.

   "15,000+ Vehicles Serviced", "20+ Years Experience", "4.8 Google Rating", "90-Day Warranty".

   Each: icon + heading + paragraph + caption (starting price). General Service, Engine Repair, Brake & Suspension, AC Repair, Electrical, Transmission, Body Work, Tyre & Alignment.

6. **tabs (By Vehicle Type)**
   Tabs: Cars, SUVs, Commercial Vehicles, Vintage/Classic. Each: specific services and expertise.

7. **layout-row (Transparent Pricing)**
   heading + paragraph ("No hidden charges") + accordion: service packages with detailed pricing breakdown.

8. **layout-row (Our Workshop)**
   carousel of workshop images + heading + paragraph (equipment, lifts, diagnostic tools).

9. **layout-row (Certified & Trusted)**
   columnsgrid (4 cols): icon + caption. Certified Mechanics, Genuine Parts, Warranty on Repairs, Digital Job Cards.

10. **carousel (Customer Reviews)**
   rating + blockquote + caption (customer, car model).

11. **layout-row (Emergency Roadside)**
    heading + paragraph + button ("Call for Roadside Help") + badge ("24/7 Available").

12. **form (Book a Service)**
    textbox (name), textbox (phone), textbox (car make/model), textbox (registration number), dropdown (service type), calendar (preferred date), textarea (problem description), button.

13. **layout-row (Footer)**
    Address, phone, hours, Google Maps, social links.

   Image (car lot / featured car), heading ("Certified Pre-Owned Cars at Unbeatable Prices") + paragraph + two buttons ("View Inventory", "Sell Your Car").

3. **br (divider)**
   Visual separator between hero and content sections.

4. **counter-up (Dealership Trust)**
   "500+ Cars Sold", "100-Point Inspection", "6-Month Warranty", "Easy EMI Available".

5. **tabs (Browse by Category)**
   Tabs: Hatchbacks, Sedans, SUVs, Luxury, Under ₹5 Lakh, Under ₹10 Lakh. Each: columnsgrid of car cards — image + heading (make/model/year) + caption (km driven, fuel type) + counter-up (price) + button.

6. **layout-row (Why Buy From Us)**
   columnsgrid (4 cols): icon + heading + caption. 100-Point Inspection, 6-Month Warranty, Easy Finance, Free RC Transfer, Insurance Assistance.

7. **layout-row (How It Works — Buying)**
   3-step: icon + heading + caption. "Browse & Shortlist" → "Test Drive & Inspect" → "Finance & Drive Home".

8. **layout-row (Sell Your Car)**
   heading + paragraph + 3-step: "Get Instant Valuation" → "Free Inspection" → "Same-Day Payment" + button ("Get Your Car's Value").

9. **carousel (Happy Customers)**
   Customer with car photos + blockquote + rating.

10. **accordion (FAQs)**
   Warranty coverage, finance options, documentation needed, trade-in policy.

11. **form (Enquiry / Test Drive)**
    textbox (name), textbox (phone), dropdown (interested in: Buying / Selling / Both), textbox (car preference or car details), button.

12. **layout-row (Footer)**
    Showroom address, phone, hours, RTO assistance info, social links.

**Page 2: Car Detail Page**

1. **carousel** (multi-angle photos)
2. **layout-row** (specs: heading, columnsgrid of details, inspection report summary)
3. **br (divider)**
   Visual separator between hero and content sections.

4. **form** (book test drive / EMI calculator)

# Pet Services — Vets / Groomers / Pet Shops

> Focus: Emotional Trust
context_header: # Source: 15_pet_services.md | Section: Introduction
content_with_context:
# Source: 15_pet_services.md | Section: Introduction
# Pet Services — Vets / Groomers / Pet Shops

> Focus: Emotional Trust

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Vetic | https://vetic.in | Navigation split by pet type (dog/cat), "Book Now" always visible, emergency care CTA, pet health app as retention tool |
| SKS Veterinary Hospital | https://www.skspethospital.com | "Centers of Excellence" positioning (mirrors human healthcare), vet profiles with credentials, 24/7 emergency highlight |
| Crown Vet | https://www.crown.vet | Specialist-focused (board-certified surgeons), separate dog/cat wards, advanced diagnostics emphasis, "Book Now" per location |
| Woofly | https://woofly.in | City-first navigation, doorstep grooming model, pricing transparency, multi-pet type coverage, FAQ for trust |
| Oh My Pet Grooming | https://ohmypetgrooming.in | WhatsApp booking critical, hygiene protocols section (post-COVID), multiple booking channels |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- "Book Now" button always prominently visible in header
- Warm, friendly imagery of pets with professionals builds emotional connection
- Emergency care CTA is critical for veterinary clinics (24/7 availability)
- Team/vet profiles with credentials build trust
- WhatsApp booking is essential in Indian market
- City/location navigation is primary for multi-location services
- Pet type categorization (dog/cat/exotic) in navigation
- Hygiene protocols section is now expected (post-COVID awareness)
- Service packages with transparent pricing for grooming services

content:
# Travel & Tourism — Tour Operators / Homestays

> Focus: Inspiration & Booking
context_header: # Source: 16_travel_tourism.md | Section: Introduction
content_with_context:
# Source: 16_travel_tourism.md | Section: Introduction
# Travel & Tourism — Tour Operators / Homestays

> Focus: Inspiration & Booking

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| SOTC | https://www.sotc.in | Destination carousel hero with pricing, theme-based tour categorization, 75 years trust, multi-service (tours + forex + visa) |
| Thomas Cook India | https://www.thomascook.in | Multi-service platform, search hero with tabs, "starting from" pricing on cards, forex as additional revenue |
| Hidden Treasures of India | https://htoindia.com | Inbound operator targeting international visitors, government credential badges, TripAdvisor integration, personal coordinator USP |
| Bout India | https://www.boutindia.com | Luxury positioning with premium imagery, "Travel Moods" categorization, detailed trip enquiry form with budget |
| Homestays of India | https://www.homestaysofindia.com | Region-based navigation, two-sided platform (guests + hosts), "supporting local livelihoods" social mission, host profiles |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Destination imagery hero is universal (full-width, high-quality photos)
- Package cards with pricing ("starting from") drive comparison and booking
- Theme/mood categorization helps diverse audiences find relevant tours
- Testimonials with trip photos are more persuasive than text-only
- Multi-service platforms (tours + forex + visa + insurance) maximize revenue
- Government credentials and TripAdvisor badges are essential trust signals
- Region/destination-first navigation over service-first
- Trip enquiry forms capture planning details (dates, interests, group size, budget)
- Seasonal offers create urgency

1. **titlebar**
   Agency name/logo, nav (Destinations, Packages, About, Testimonials, Contact), button ("Plan My Trip").

2. **carousel (Hero — Destination Showcase)**
   Full-width stunning destination images with overlay: heading (destination name) + caption (package highlight) + button ("Explore").

3. **br (divider)**
   Visual separator between hero and content sections.

4. **counter-up (Travel Stats)**
   "10,000+ Happy Travelers", "100+ Destinations", "15+ Years", "4.8 Rating".

   Each: image + heading (destination) + caption (starting price, duration) + button ("View Package"). Goa, Kerala, Rajasthan, Kashmir, Ladakh, Andaman, Himachal, Northeast.

   Tabs: Honeymoon, Family, Adventure, Pilgrimage, Corporate, International. Each: 3-4 package cards with image + details + price + button.

   Large image + heading + paragraph (detailed itinerary preview) + counter-up (price) + countdown ("Limited Offer Ends:") + button ("Book Now").

9. **ticker (Hotel & Airline Partners)**
   Scrolling partner logos.

10. **carousel (Traveler Stories)**
   Travel photos + blockquote + rating + caption (traveler, destination).

11. **form (Trip Enquiry)**
    textbox (name), textbox (phone), textbox (email), dropdown (destination/type), calendar (travel dates), textbox (number of travelers), dropdown (budget range), textarea (special requirements), button.

12. **layout-row (Footer)**
    Office address, phone, email, social links, IATA/tourism board affiliations.

2. **tabs** (itinerary by day)

content:
# Printing & Signage — Print Shops / Trophy Makers

> Focus: Custom Orders
context_header: # Source: 18_printing_signage.md | Section: Introduction
content_with_context:
# Source: 18_printing_signage.md | Section: Introduction
# Printing & Signage — Print Shops / Trophy Makers

> Focus: Custom Orders

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| PrintStop | https://www.printstop.co.in | Product category grid as primary conversion, "Design Now" CTA per product, sample pack for tactile concern, quality guarantee badges |
| FlexiPrint | https://www.flexiprint.in | Personal point of contact differentiator, sample pack prominent, custom quote form, production team review emphasis |
| Thomson Press | https://www.thomsonpress.com | Industrial/corporate B2B, multi-factory infrastructure, legacy since 1967, product-oriented, sales offices for meetings |
| Galaxy Signage | https://www.galaxysignage.com | Portfolio/gallery as primary proof, industry-vertical targeting, CNC/technology emphasis, client logo bar for B2B trust |
| Cosign India | https://cosign.in | Premium/architectural positioning, modular system approach, global presence, application-based gallery (context, not just product) |
| The Sign Co. | https://www.thesignco.in | Full lifecycle service (design to installation), value engineering for budget clients, smart city as emerging market |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Product category grid is the primary navigation for print companies
- Portfolio/gallery is critical for signage companies (visual proof of work)
- Sample packs address the "can't touch" challenge of online print ordering
- Request for Quote (RFQ) forms instead of add-to-cart for custom/B2B products
- Manufacturing capabilities showcase builds confidence (CNC, offset, digital)
- Client logo bars are essential B2B trust signals
- Industry vertical targeting (retail, hospitality, corporate) helps B2B positioning
- Quality guarantee badges address print quality anxiety
- Personal point of contact differentiates from mass-market platforms
- Legacy/experience (25+ years, since 1967) is the primary trust signal

---

content:
**Page: Home (Single Page)**

1. **titlebar**
   Shop name/logo, nav (Services, Products, Pricing, Portfolio, Contact), button ("Get a Quote").

2. **layout-row (Hero Split)**
   Left: heading ("Your Ideas, Perfectly Printed") + paragraph (fast turnaround, quality printing, competitive prices) + button ("Request a Quote"). Right: image (printed materials — brochures, banners, cards).

3. **br (divider)**
   Visual separator between hero and content sections.

4. **columnsgrid (Services — 4 columns)**
   Each: icon + heading + caption. Business Cards, Brochures & Flyers, Banners & Signage, T-Shirt Printing, Stickers & Labels, Packaging, Large Format, Book Printing.

5. **tabs (Product Categories)**
   Tabs: Marketing Materials, Signage, Merchandise, Packaging, Stationery. Each: columnsgrid of products with image + heading + caption (quantity/price).

6. **layout-row (How It Works)**
   3-step: icon + heading + paragraph. "Upload Your Design (or use ours)" → "Review & Approve Proof" → "Print & Deliver".

7. **layout-row (Quick Pricing Guide)**
   accordion: Business Cards (100/250/500/1000 qty pricing), Flyers, Brochures, Banners — each with size options and price tiers.

8. **counter-up (Shop Stats)**
   "50,000+ Orders Completed", "Same-Day Available", "500+ Business Clients", "10+ Years".

9. **carousel (Portfolio)**
   Showcase of printed work: brochures, packaging, signage installations.

10. **layout-row (Design Services)**
   heading + paragraph (in-house design team, logo design, layout) + button ("Need a Design?").

11. **ticker (Trusted By)**
    Scrolling logos of regular business clients.

12. **form (Quote Request)**
    textbox (name), textbox (phone), textbox (email), dropdown (product type), textbox (quantity), dropdown (size), textarea (specifications — paper, colors, finishing), button.

13. **layout-row (Footer)**
    Shop address, hours, phone, email, file upload instructions, social.

# Coaching & Sports — Academies / Swimming / Martial Arts

> Focus: Skill Progress
context_header: # Source: 19_coaching_sports.md | Section: Introduction
content_with_context:
# Source: 19_coaching_sports.md | Section: Introduction
# Coaching & Sports — Academies / Swimming / Martial Arts

> Focus: Skill Progress

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Bluewater Sports Academy | https://bluewatersportsacademy.com/ | Multi-sport with swimming-first hierarchy, tiered progression (learn to competitive to elite), multi-location support |
| Ramagya Sports Academy | https://ramagyasportsacademy.com/ | Dedicated page per sport for SEO, stats/counter section, age-group targeting (3+ to adult), dual sports + fitness focus |
| Sports Academy of India | https://sportsacademyofindia.com/ | Plan-based pricing (SaaS-like), holistic development (physical + mental), online/offline hybrid model |
| Oriental Martial Arts | https://jaipursportsacademy.com/ | Heritage emphasis ("first gym since 1987"), martial arts primary with multi-sport, health support (physician, dietician) |
| Lakshyan Academy of Sports | https://www.lakshyanacademyofsports.com/ | Infrastructure-first messaging (FINA pool, FIBA courts), residential academy model, Sports Science & Analytics Centre |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Hero with action imagery (athletes mid-training, swimming, martial arts stances)
- Program cards with age/skill tiers (Learn, Compete, Elite progression)
- Stats/counter sections (years, students trained, coaches, sports offered)
- Coach profiles with credentials (certifications, competition history, specializations)
- Multi-sport navigation with dedicated page per sport
- Trial class / enrollment CTAs prominent throughout
- Facility gallery with high-quality photos of pools, courts, gyms
- Testimonials from both parents and students
- Age-group segmentation in program navigation

content:
# Logistics & Courier — Local Delivery / Packers & Movers

> Focus: Reliability & Speed
context_header: # Source: 20_logistics_courier.md | Section: Introduction
content_with_context:
# Source: 20_logistics_courier.md | Section: Introduction
# Logistics & Courier — Local Delivery / Packers & Movers

> Focus: Reliability & Speed

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Agarwal Packers & Movers | https://www.agarwalpackers.com/ | Quote form as PRIMARY hero CTA, consignment tracking feature, step-by-step process timeline, 38+ years trust, insurance emphasis |
| Porter | https://porter.in/ | Uber-like pickup/drop booking interface, vehicle visual comparison, transparent pricing, dual audience (individual + enterprise) |
| Cloud Packers | https://www.cloudpackers.com/ | 30 days free storage, live tracking, pet relocation niche, 24/7 WhatsApp/phone support, discount promotions |
| TheTransporter | https://www.thetransporter.in/ | Eco-friendly packing differentiator, 12+ distinct services, consignment tracking as top-level nav, technology/equipment relocation |
| Rehousing Packers | https://www.rehousingpackers.in/ | Price estimate tool for transparency, promotional discounts (15% off), city-specific landing pages for SEO |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Quote form is THE hero element (instant quote request dominates above-fold)
- Step-by-step process visualization reduces anxiety about moving
- Consignment tracking builds trust and reduces support calls
- Stats/counter-up (years, successful moves, cities covered)
- City-specific pages for local SEO strategy
- Vehicle/service comparison with visual truck size guide
- Discount/promotional banners (price-sensitive market)
- Insurance and safety messaging about careful handling
- WhatsApp as primary booking/support channel
- Pet relocation and specialized services as differentiators

# Cleaning Services — Deep Clean / Housekeeping

> Focus: Trust & Convenience
context_header: # Source: 21_cleaning_services.md | Section: Introduction
content_with_context:
# Source: 21_cleaning_services.md | Section: Introduction
# Cleaning Services — Deep Clean / Housekeeping

> Focus: Trust & Convenience

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Safaiwale | https://safaiwale.in/ | 30+ cleaning services catalog, BHK-based pricing, before/after gallery, phone number prominent, blog-heavy SEO |
| Busy Bucket | https://busybucket.in/ | 7-step professional process, trust & safety section (background verification), mechanized cleaning emphasis |
| Urban Company | https://www.urbancompany.com/ | Search-first homepage, multi-category marketplace, standardized pricing, app-first approach, quality promise badges |
| Snabbit | https://snabbit.com/ | "10 Minutes" speed promise as brand identity, app-only model, trust verification heavy, on-demand model |
| AYS Max | https://aysmax.com/ | WhatsApp as primary booking, detailed "what's included" lists, BHK-based pricing, multiple booking channels |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Phone number and WhatsApp prominently displayed for direct booking
- BHK-based pricing (1BHK, 2BHK, 3BHK) is India-specific and intuitive
- Before/after galleries provide visual proof of cleaning quality
- Trust & verification section addresses concern about strangers in homes
- 3-step "How It Works" (Book > Clean > Relax) simplicity
- Service breakdown with detailed inclusions removes ambiguity
- Multiple booking channels (phone, WhatsApp, online form, app)
- Review/testimonial focus for trust-critical services

---

| Urban Company | https://www.urbancompany.com/ | Search-first homepage, multi-category marketplace, standardized pricing, app-first approach, quality promise badges |
| Snabbit | https://snabbit.com/ | "10 Minutes" speed promise as brand identity, app-only model, trust verification heavy, on-demand model |
| AYS Max | https://aysmax.com/ | WhatsApp as primary booking, detailed "what's included" lists, BHK-based pricing, multiple booking channels |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Phone number and WhatsApp prominently displayed for direct booking
- BHK-based pricing (1BHK, 2BHK, 3BHK) is India-specific and intuitive
- Before/after galleries provide visual proof of cleaning quality
- Trust & verification section addresses concern about strangers in homes
- 3-step "How It Works" (Book > Clean > Relax) simplicity
- Service breakdown with detailed inclusions removes ambiguity
- Multiple booking channels (phone, WhatsApp, online form, app)
- Review/testimonial focus for trust-critical services

---

content:
# Coworking — Shared Spaces / Office Rentals

> Focus: Flexibility
context_header: # Source: 24_coworking.md | Section: Introduction
content_with_context:
# Source: 24_coworking.md | Section: Introduction
# Coworking — Shared Spaces / Office Rentals

> Focus: Flexibility

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Awfis | https://www.awfis.com/ | Booking-first hero (city + type + date), cost calculator vs traditional office, day pass entry point (Rs 300/day), 150+ centres |
| Innov8 | https://www.innov8.work/ | Community-first messaging (events, networking), premium interior photography, customized office builder, Rs 2999/month entry |
| BHIVE Workspace | https://bhiveworkspace.com/ | Bangalore hyperlocal focus, location-first navigation, day pass prominent, enterprise security (biometric, CCTV) |
| Incuspaze | https://www.incuspaze.com/ | Five service lines (Coworking, Managed, Design-Build, Fit-Out, Lease), enterprise-focused, Design & Build portfolio |
| CoFynd | https://cofynd.com/ | Marketplace aggregator model, 100,000+ spaces, brand directory (WeWork, Awfis), coliving alongside coworking |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Search/booking interface as hero (city + workspace type + date selection)
- Workspace type comparison (Hot Desk vs Dedicated vs Private Cabin vs Managed Office)
- Location-focused navigation with city and neighborhood detail
- Interior photography of modern, well-designed spaces
- Pricing transparency with "starting from" prices
- Amenities icon grid (WiFi, meeting rooms, pantry, parking, 24/7, power backup)
- Community/events section differentiates from traditional office
- Client logo ticker for enterprise credibility
- Cost calculator/comparison (traditional office vs coworking savings)
- Day pass / low-commitment entry to reduce conversion friction
- Enterprise solutions with separate messaging for corporates
- Inquiry form with team size for customized quotes

---

content:
**Page: Home (Single Page)**

1. **titlebar**
   Brand name/logo, nav (Spaces, Pricing, Community, Locations, Contact), button ("Book a Tour").

2. **video-background (Hero)**
   Vibrant coworking footage (people working, collaborating, events), overlay: heading ("Work Anywhere, Grow Everywhere") + paragraph + two buttons ("See Plans", "Book a Tour").

3. **br (divider)**
   Visual separator between hero and content sections.

4. **counter-up (Community Numbers)**
   "500+ Members", "3 Locations", "24/7 Access", "100+ Events/Year".

5. **tabs (Workspace Options)**
   Tabs: Hot Desk, Dedicated Desk, Private Office, Meeting Room, Virtual Office, Event Space. Each: image + paragraph (capacity, amenities) + counter-up (starting price/month) + button.

6. **carousel (Space Gallery)**
   Photos of desks, private offices, meeting rooms, lounge, kitchen, phone booths.

7. **columnsgrid (Amenities — 4 columns)**
   Each: icon + caption. High-Speed WiFi, Printing, Coffee & Snacks, Locker, Mail Handling, Parking, Power Backup, Reception.

8. **layout-row (Pricing Comparison)**
   columnsgrid (4 cards): Hot Desk / Dedicated / Private (4-person) / Private (8-person). Each: heading + counter-up (price/month) + paragraph (inclusions) + button.

9. **layout-row (Community)**
   heading + paragraph (networking events, workshops, social hours) + carousel of event photos.

10. **ticker (Member Companies)**
   Scrolling member/startup logos.

11. **layout-row (Locations)**
    tabs or columnsgrid: image + heading (location name) + paragraph (address, metro proximity) + button ("View This Space").

12. **carousel (Member Testimonials)**
    blockquote + rating + caption (member, company).

13. **form (Book a Tour / Enquiry)**
    textbox (name), textbox (email), textbox (phone), dropdown (workspace type), dropdown (team size), dropdown (preferred location), calendar (tour date), button.

14. **layout-row (Footer)**
    All location addresses, phone, email, social, blog link, careers.

> Focus: Credibility & Impact
context_header: # Source: 25_ngo_nonprofits.md | Section: Introduction
content_with_context:
# Source: 25_ngo_nonprofits.md | Section: Introduction
# NGO & Non-Profits — Charities / Foundations

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Smile Foundation | https://www.smilefoundationindia.org/ | Emotional hero imagery, persistent "Donate Now" CTA, impact counter-up, programme-centric navigation with branded names |
| Akshaya Patra | https://www.akshayapatra.org/ | Single powerful stat hero ("2.35M meals daily"), transparency/accountability section, international donation routing |
| Goonj | https://goonj.org/ | Material donation model (clothing/goods), collection camp locator, campaign progress bars, volunteer emphasis |
| CRY | https://www.cry.org/ | Multiple donation pathways (UPI, cards, monthly, legacy), tax exemption messaging near donate buttons |
| Raise India Foundation | https://www.raiseindiafoundation.org/ | Hospital partnership branding, seasonal campaigns, government registration details for legitimacy |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Emotional beneficiary imagery throughout with empowering headlines
- Persistent "Donate Now" floating button or header CTA
- Impact numbers prominently displayed with counter-up animation
- Tax benefit messaging (80G) near donation CTAs
- Programme cards grid with branded initiative names
- Beneficiary success stories carousel
- Transparency section (audit compliance, annual reports, certifications)
- Multiple donation pathways and recurring donation emphasis
- Volunteer/Get Involved section alongside monetary donations
- Newsletter signup for ongoing engagement

content:
**Page 1: Home**

1. **titlebar**
   NGO name/logo, nav (Our Work, Programs, Impact, Get Involved, Donate), button ("Donate Now").

2. **layout-row (Hero)**
   Impactful image (children learning/playing), heading ("Every Child Deserves a Chance to Learn") + paragraph (mission statement) + two buttons ("Donate Now", "See Our Impact").

3. **br (divider)**
   Visual separator between hero and content sections.

4. **counter-up (Impact Numbers)**
   "10,000+ Children Educated", "50+ Schools Supported", "15+ Years of Impact", "95% of Funds Reach Beneficiaries".

5. **columnsgrid (Our Programs — 3 columns)**
   Each: image + heading + paragraph + button. School Infrastructure, Teacher Training, Scholarship Program, Digital Learning, Mid-Day Meals, Girl Child Education.

6. **layout-row (Our Story)**
   image (founder/team) + heading + paragraph (origin story, vision, mission) + badge ("Registered Non-Profit").

7. **tabs (Impact Stories)**
   2-3 featured stories: image + heading + paragraph (individual transformation story) + button ("Read More").

8. **progress-bar (Current Campaign Goals)**
   Multiple bars: "Build 5 New Classrooms — 72% Funded", "1000 Scholarships — 60% Achieved", "Digital Lab Setup — 45% Complete".

9. **layout-row (How You Can Help)**
   columnsgrid (3 cols): icon + heading + paragraph + button. Donate, Volunteer, Corporate Partnership.

10. **layout-row (Donate Section)**
   heading + paragraph + columnsgrid of donation amounts: "₹500 — Feeds a child for a month", "₹2000 — School supplies for a year", "₹10,000 — Sponsor a child's education" + button each.

11. **ticker (Partners & Supporters)**
    Scrolling corporate partner and donor logos.

12. **carousel (Testimonials from Beneficiaries & Donors)**
    blockquote + image + caption.

13. **layout-row (Transparency)**
    heading + paragraph (annual reports, audited accounts) + button ("View Annual Report") + badges (FCRA, 80G, 12A registrations).

14. **layout-row (Footer)**
    Address, phone, email, FCRA number, 80G info, social media, newsletter signup.

**Page 2: Impact Report**

1. **counter-up** (yearly stats)
2. **columnsgrid** (project-wise progress with progress-bars)
3. **br (divider)**
   Visual separator between hero and content sections.

4. **accordion** (financial summary)

# Daycare & Childcare — Creches / Play Schools

> Focus: Safety & Trust
context_header: # Source: 26_daycare_childcare.md | Section: Introduction
content_with_context:
# Source: 26_daycare_childcare.md | Section: Introduction
# Daycare & Childcare — Creches / Play Schools

> Focus: Safety & Trust

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| EuroKids | https://www.eurokidsindia.com/ | Admission-focused hero with age calculator, Harvard-inspired "Heureka" curriculum branding, centre locator, franchise CTA |
| Bachpan Play School | https://www.bachpanglobal.com/ | NEP 2020 compliance branding, Smart Classes technology, Speak-O-Pen nanotech tool, franchise-heavy design |
| KLAY Preschool | https://klay.co.in/ | Age-based programs (months, not years), safety-first (CCTV), daycare + preschool dual offering, after-school care |
| Footprints Childcare | https://www.footprintseducation.in/ | IIT/IIM founder credentials, ParentConnect App, live CCTV access, HighScope US curriculum |
| Little Millennium | https://www.littlemillennium.com/ | Creative program naming, virtual tour feature, 4-step admission process, ROI-focused franchise |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Admission-focused hero with enrollment CTA and age calculator
- Age-based program segmentation (months for daycare, years for preschool)
- Curriculum branding (named approaches: Heureka, HighScope, Montessori)
- Centre locator with city search for nearest branch
- Safety features section (CCTV, child-safe design, parent apps)
- Parent testimonials carousel
- Franchise opportunity section with investment details
- Statistics bar (centers, cities, children enrolled)
- Bright, playful design with rounded corners and primary colors
- Technology features (smart classes, parent apps, virtual tours)

content:
**Page: Home (Single Page)**

1. **titlebar**
   Center name/logo, nav (Programs, Safety, Gallery, Admissions, Contact), button ("Schedule a Visit").

2. **layout-row (Hero Split)**
   Left: heading ("A Safe, Loving Second Home for Your Little One") + paragraph (nurturing environment, qualified caregivers) + button ("Schedule a Visit"). Right: image (happy children at play).

3. **br (wave divider)**
   Visual separator between hero and content sections.

4. **counter-up (Trust Indicators)**
   "500+ Families Trust Us", "1:5 Caregiver Ratio", "CCTV Monitored", "10+ Years".

5. **columnsgrid (Our Programs — 3 columns)**
   Each: icon + heading + paragraph. Infant Care (6m-1yr), Toddler Program (1-2yr), Pre-Nursery (2-3yr), After-School Care, Holiday Camp, Weekend Care.

6. **layout-row (A Day at Our Center)**
   accordion or tabs by time: 8AM Drop-off & Free Play → 9AM Circle Time → 10AM Snack → 10:30 Learning Activity → 12PM Lunch → 1PM Nap Time → 3PM Outdoor Play → 5PM Pickup.

7. **tabs (Safety & Hygiene)**
   Tabs: Physical Safety, Health Protocols, Staff Screening, Emergency Procedures. Each: paragraph + icon grid.

8. **layout-row (Our Caregivers)**
   columnsgrid: image + heading (name) + caption (qualification, experience) + badge ("CPR Certified").

9. **carousel (Our Space)**
   Photos: playrooms, sleep area, outdoor area, kitchen, CCTV setup.

10. **layout-row (Parent Communication)**
   heading + paragraph (daily updates, app notifications, CCTV access, monthly reports) + icon list.

11. **carousel (Parent Testimonials)**
    blockquote + rating + caption (parent name, child's age).

12. **accordion (FAQs)**
    Admission process, fees, timings, meal policy, sick child policy, trial period, CCTV access.

13. **form (Admission Enquiry / Visit)**
    textbox (parent name), textbox (phone), textbox (child's name), textbox (child's age), dropdown (program interest), calendar (visit date), textarea (special needs/requirements), button.

14. **layout-row (Footer)**
    Address, phone, email, hours, license number, social media.

content_with_context:

# Music & Dance — Academies / Studios

> Focus: Passion & Progress

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| The Danceworx | https://www.thedanceworx.com/ | RAD certification as trust signal, Ashley Lobo founder brand, class level progression, online + in-person |
| SSDA | https://ssda.in/ | Founder story prominent, 20,000+ student count, dark dramatic color scheme, gallery-heavy |
| PAIPA Studio | https://paipa.in/ | Award-first messaging (18x "Best Academy"), combined dance + music, wide variety of styles |
| Furtados School of Music | https://furtadosschoolofmusic.com/ | Trinity College London accreditation, instrument-centric courses, age-based programs, 9 cities |
| Shankar Mahadevan Academy | https://www.shankarmahadevanacademy.com/ | Celebrity founder as brand, 100% online model, proprietary OM Book platform, global reach (50+ countries) |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Performance imagery hero with dynamic dance/music photos or videos
- Course/style grid showing all available dance styles or instruments
- Founder/celebrity branding prominently displayed
- International certification badges (RAD, Trinity) as trust signals
- Level progression path (Beginner > Intermediate > Advanced)
- Gallery/portfolio of performances in masonry or carousel
- Statistics bar (students trained, years, branches)
- Online + offline class options highlighted
- Enrollment inquiry form
- Dark/dramatic color schemes befitting performing arts

   Visual separator between hero and content sections.

content:
# Dental — Dental Clinics

> Focus: Anxiety Reduction & Trust
context_header: # Source: 28_dental.md | Section: Introduction
content_with_context:
# Source: 28_dental.md | Section: Introduction
# Dental — Dental Clinics

> Focus: Anxiety Reduction & Trust

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Clove Dental | https://clovedental.in/ | "Book Appointment" persistent CTA, clinic locator for 650+ locations, weekend availability, city-wise SEO pages |
| Sabka Dentist | https://sabkadentist.com/ | "FREE consultation" as lead generator, monthly promotional offers with pricing, before/after gallery, affordability messaging |
| Apollo Dental | https://apollodental.in/ | Hospital group brand trust (Apollo), technology-first messaging (German equipment, microscopes), doctor profiles |
| Orthosquare | https://www.orthosquare.com/ | Free first consultation, "No Cost EMI" affordability, PAN India presence, clean clinical design |
| Dazzle Dental | https://www.dazzle.dental/ | Ultra-premium luxury positioning, celebrity dentist branding, medical tourism, pain-free sedation focus |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- "Book Appointment" as persistent header CTA
- Free consultation offer as primary lead generation
- Treatment icon grid (fillings, root canal, implants, braces, aligners, cosmetic)
- Clinic/location finder with city and area search
- Before/after galleries for cosmetic treatment results
- Doctor profiles with specialist qualifications
- Technology showcase (equipment and tech as trust builders)
- Patient testimonials with star ratings
- EMI/payment options and affordability messaging
- Helpline number prominently displayed
- Clean clinical design (white/blue palette)

content:
**Page: Home (Single Page)**

1. **titlebar**
   Clinic name/logo, nav (Services, Our Dentists, Smile Gallery, Patient Info, Contact), button ("Book Appointment").

2. **layout-row (Hero Split)**
   Left: heading ("Gentle Dental Care for the Whole Family") + paragraph (comfortable, modern, caring) + button ("Book Your Visit") + caption ("New patients welcome!"). Right: image (smiling family / friendly dentist).

3. **br (wave divider)**
   Visual separator between hero and content sections.

4. **counter-up (Trust Stats)**
   "10,000+ Smiles Created", "15+ Years", "Pain-Free Dentistry", "4.9 Google Rating".

5. **columnsgrid (Services — 3 columns)**
   Each: icon + heading + paragraph. Cleanings & Checkups, Fillings & Crowns, Root Canal, Teeth Whitening, Braces & Aligners, Kids Dentistry, Wisdom Teeth, Emergency Care.

6. **layout-row (Meet Our Dentists)**
   columnsgrid: image + heading (name) + caption (specialization: General, Orthodontics, Pediatric, Endodontics) + paragraph (credentials) + badge ("Chief Dentist").

7. **tabs (Treatment Details)**
   Tabs: Preventive, Cosmetic, Restorative, Orthodontics, Surgical. Each: paragraph (what to expect, duration, cost range) + image.

8. **layout-row (Our Technology)**
   columnsgrid (4 cols): icon + heading + caption. Digital X-Rays, Laser Dentistry, 3D Scanning, Painless Anesthesia.

9. **carousel (Smile Gallery — Before/After)**
   Before/after dental transformations.

10. **layout-row (Patient Comfort)**
   heading + paragraph (relaxation amenities, gentle approach, sedation options) + image (comfortable clinic interior).

11. **accordion (Patient Information)**
    Items: First visit guide, Insurance accepted, Payment plans/EMI, Pre-treatment instructions, Post-treatment care.

12. **carousel (Patient Reviews)**
    rating + blockquote + caption.

13. **form (Book Appointment)**
    textbox (name), textbox (phone), dropdown (service needed), dropdown (new or existing patient), calendar (preferred date), dropdown (time slot), textarea (concerns), button.

14. **layout-row (Footer)**
    Address, phone, emergency number, hours, insurance partners, social links.
