> Focus: Inspiration & Visualization
context_header: # Source: 29_interior_design.md | Section: Introduction
content_with_context:
# Source: 29_interior_design.md | Section: Introduction
# Interior Design — Designers / Decor Studios

> Focus: Inspiration & Visualization

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Livspace | https://www.livspace.com/in | Lead capture form on hero, room-by-room galleries, experience centre visits, price calculator, before/after transformations |
| DesignCafe | https://www.designcafe.com/ | 5000+ homes portfolio, city-specific pages, end-to-end messaging, video testimonials, consultation form |
| Decorpot | https://www.decorpot.com/ | Price calculator prominent, Indian-specific rooms (Pooja Unit), 35+ experience centers, customer login portal |
| Within Studio | https://www.within.net.in/ | Ultra-minimal luxury, large full-bleed photography, curated store, press coverage, founder-driven brand |
| Cee Bee Design Studio | https://www.ceebeedesignstudio.com/ | Woman entrepreneur founder story, Indian art + modern fusion, both residential and commercial, restoration services |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Stunning room photography hero with lead capture form (name, phone, city)
- Room-by-room design galleries (kitchen, bedroom, living room, wardrobe)
- How it works process (3-4 steps from consultation to installation)
- Price calculator as interactive cost estimation tool
- Portfolio showcase with filtered gallery of completed projects
- Experience centre CTAs for physical showroom visits
- City-specific pages for local SEO
- Counter-up statistics (projects completed, designers, cities, sq. ft.)
- Before/after transformation visuals
- End-to-end service messaging (design through execution)
- Blog/inspiration content for design ideas and trends

content:

   Firm name/logo, nav (Projects, Services, Process, About, Contact), button ("Start Your Project").

2. **carousel (Hero — Portfolio Showcase)**
   Full-width stunning interior photos (living rooms, offices, restaurants), minimal overlay: heading (project name) + caption (style/type).

3. **br (divider)**
   Visual separator between hero and content sections.

4. **columnsgrid (Services — 3 columns)**
   Each: image + heading + paragraph + button. Residential Interiors, Commercial Spaces, Modular Kitchens, Office Design, Retail Store Design, Turnkey Solutions.

5. **tabs (Portfolio by Space)**
   Tabs: Living Room, Bedroom, Kitchen, Bathroom, Office, Restaurant. Each: image grid (columnsgrid) with project cards.

6. **layout-row (Featured Project)**
   Large image carousel + heading + paragraph (design story — brief, concept, execution) + badge ("Award Winner") + button ("View Full Project").

    Office/studio address, phone, email, social (Instagram/Pinterest prominent), Houzz/portfolio links.

content:
# Turf & Recreation — Cricket Turfs / Badminton Courts

> Focus: Instant Availability
context_header: # Source: 30_turf_recreation.md | Section: Introduction
content_with_context:
# Source: 30_turf_recreation.md | Section: Introduction
# Turf & Recreation — Cricket Turfs / Badminton Courts

> Focus: Instant Availability

content:
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| TurfBooking.in | https://turfbooking.in/ | Search-first design (location + sport + date), city-centric navigation, two-sided marketplace (players + owners), instant confirmation |
| PlaySpots | https://www.playspots.in/ | Beyond booking: coaching, tournaments, academy finder, venue management software for B2B |
| Turf Town | https://turftown.in/ | Community-first (not just booking), gamification (Turf ID, MVPs, Turf Level), clubs and social features, app-centric |
| Hudle | https://hudle.in/ | 50+ sports variety, GRIP rating system, Super Sports Parks concept, exclusive venue partnerships |
| Sporloc | https://www.sporloc.com/ | Venue type differentiation (indoor/outdoor/gymkhana), direct weekly bank deposits for owners, multiple payment methods |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Search-first hero with location + sport + date search bar
- Sports category icon grid (cricket, football, badminton, etc.)
- City-centric navigation and discovery
- Venue cards with photos, ratings, pricing, availability
- How it works (3 steps: Search > Select > Book & Pay)
- Two-sided marketplace features (players + venue owners)
- Mobile app promotion as primary CTA
- Community/social features (player matching, clubs, events)
- Gamification (skill ratings, levels, achievements)
- Payment variety and instant booking confirmation
- B2B venue management tools for owners

---

content_with_context:
# Source: 30_turf_recreation.md | Section: Real Website Examples & Key Insights
| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| TurfBooking.in | https://turfbooking.in/ | Search-first design (location + sport + date), city-centric navigation, two-sided marketplace (players + owners), instant confirmation |
| PlaySpots | https://www.playspots.in/ | Beyond booking: coaching, tournaments, academy finder, venue management software for B2B |
| Turf Town | https://turftown.in/ | Community-first (not just booking), gamification (Turf ID, MVPs, Turf Level), clubs and social features, app-centric |
| Hudle | https://hudle.in/ | 50+ sports variety, GRIP rating system, Super Sports Parks concept, exclusive venue partnerships |
| Sporloc | https://www.sporloc.com/ | Venue type differentiation (indoor/outdoor/gymkhana), direct weekly bank deposits for owners, multiple payment methods |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Search-first hero with location + sport + date search bar
- Sports category icon grid (cricket, football, badminton, etc.)
- City-centric navigation and discovery
- Venue cards with photos, ratings, pricing, availability
- How it works (3 steps: Search > Select > Book & Pay)
- Two-sided marketplace features (players + venue owners)
- Mobile app promotion as primary CTA
- Community/social features (player matching, clubs, events)
- Gamification (skill ratings, levels, achievements)
- Payment variety and instant booking confirmation
- B2B venue management tools for owners

---

content:
**Page: Home (Single Page — Booking-Focused)**

1. **titlebar**
   Turf name/logo, nav (Book, Facilities, Pricing, Gallery, Contact), badge ("Open 6 AM - Midnight"), button ("Book a Slot").

2. **layout-row (Hero)**
   Image (action shot on turf / lit-up turf at night), heading ("Game On! Book Your Turf Instantly") + paragraph + form inline: calendar (date) + dropdown (time slot) + dropdown (duration) + button ("Check Availability").

3. **br (divider)**
   Visual separator between hero and content sections.

4. **counter-up (Turf Stats)**
   "500+ Games/Month", "FIFA-Certified Turf", "LED Floodlights", "Instant Online Booking".

5. **columnsgrid (Our Turfs — 2-3 columns)**
   Each: image + heading (turf name/type) + caption (dimensions, surface type) + badge ("Premium" / "Standard") + counter-up (price/hour) + button ("Book This Turf").

6. **tabs (Sports Available)**
   Tabs: Box Cricket, Football, Multi-Sport. Each: image + paragraph (turf specs, rules, max players) + pricing.

7. **layout-row (Facilities)**
   columnsgrid (4 cols): icon + caption. Floodlights, Changing Rooms, Drinking Water, Parking, First Aid, Equipment Rental, Spectator Seating, Washrooms.

8. **layout-row (Pricing)**
   Tabs or table: Morning (6-10 AM), Day (10 AM-5 PM), Evening (5-9 PM), Night (9 PM-12 AM). Each with weekday and weekend rates.

9. **layout-row (Corporate & Tournament Bookings)**
   heading + paragraph (corporate team building, tournament hosting) + counter-up ("Hosted 50+ Tournaments") + button ("Enquire for Events").

10. **carousel (Action Gallery)**
   Game photos, tournament moments, night games.

11. **carousel (Player Reviews)**
    rating + blockquote + caption.

12. **layout-row (Location & Access)**
    image/map + heading + paragraph (address, landmark, parking info) + button ("Get Directions").

13. **form (Quick Booking / Enquiry)**
    textbox (name), textbox (phone), dropdown (sport), calendar (date), dropdown (time slot), dropdown (duration: 1hr / 2hr / Full Day), textbox (team/group name), button.

14. **layout-row (Footer)**
    Address, phone, WhatsApp (for quick booking), hours, Instagram, rules & regulations link.

---

| DPR Construction | dpr.com | Innovation stories, sustainability, VR/tech integration |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Large project photography as hero backgrounds
- Before/after project galleries
- Counter-up stats (projects completed, years experience, sq ft built)
- Safety and certification badges prominently displayed
- Process timeline (Design → Permit → Build → Inspect → Handover)

content:
**Page: Home (Single Page)**

1. **titlebar**
   Company name/logo, nav (Services, Projects, About, Process, Contact), badge ("Licensed & Insured"), button ("Get Free Estimate").

2. **layout-row (Hero)**
   Left: eyebrow ("Building Since 2005") + heading ("Quality Construction You Can Trust") + paragraph (residential and commercial projects, on-time delivery) + two buttons ("View Our Work", "Request Quote"). Right: image (active construction site or completed project).

3. **br (divider)**
   Visual separator.

4. **counter-up (Company Stats)**
   "500+ Projects Completed", "18 Years Experience", "50M+ sq ft Built", "98% On-Time Delivery".

5. **columnsgrid (Services — 3 columns)**
   Each: icon + heading + paragraph + button. New Construction, Renovations & Remodeling, Commercial Build-Outs, Additions & Extensions, Concrete & Foundation, Project Management.

6. **tabs (Project Portfolio)**
   Tabs: Residential, Commercial, Industrial. Each: columnsgrid of project images + captions (project name, location, scope).

7. **layout-row (Why Choose Us)**
   Left: heading + paragraph (differentiators). Right: columnsgrid (2x2): icon + heading + caption. Licensed & Bonded, On-Budget Guarantee, Clean Job Sites, Dedicated Project Manager.

8. **layout-row (Our Process)**
   5-step: icon + heading + caption. "Consultation" → "Design & Planning" → "Permits & Approvals" → "Construction" → "Final Walkthrough".

9. **carousel (Client Testimonials)**
   rating + blockquote + caption (client name, project type, location).

10. **ticker (Certifications & Partners)**
    Scrolling logos: OSHA, BBB, local builders association, material suppliers.

11. **accordion (FAQs)**
    How long does a project take?, Do you handle permits?, What's included in the estimate?, Do you offer warranties?, How do payments work?

12. **form (Request a Free Estimate)**
    textbox (name), textbox (phone), textbox (email), dropdown (project type), dropdown (budget range), textarea (project description), button.

13. **layout-row (Footer)**
    Phone, email, office address, license number, service areas, social links.

---

| Site | URL | Key Pattern |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Elevation Church | elevationchurch.org | Welcoming hero video, sermon series, campus locations, online church |
| Life.Church | life.church | "Plan Your Visit" CTA, service times, groups/events, giving portal |
| Saddleback Church | saddleback.com | Campus selector, event calendar, sermon archive, connect groups |
| YMCA | ymca.org | Programs grid, location finder, membership tiers, impact stats |
| Jewish Community Center | jccsf.org | Events calendar, program categories, membership, donate button |

**Patterns to incorporate:**
- Warm, welcoming hero with "Plan Your Visit" or "Join Us" CTA
- Service/program times prominently displayed
- Events calendar or upcoming events section
- Community groups/ministries/programs grid
- Location and directions easily accessible
- Giving/donation integration

content:
**Page: Home (Single Page)**

1. **titlebar**
   Church name/logo, nav (About, Services, Ministries, Events, Give, Contact), button ("Plan Your Visit").

2. **layout-row (Hero)**
   Full-width image (congregation / worship / welcoming exterior), overlay: heading ("A Place to Belong") + paragraph (welcoming message — all are welcome, come as you are) + two buttons ("Plan Your Visit", "Watch Online").

3. **br (divider)**
   Visual separator.

4. **layout-row (Service Times)**
   heading ("Join Us This Week") + columnsgrid (3 cols): icon + heading + caption. Sunday Morning (9am & 11am), Wednesday Bible Study (7pm), Youth Group (Fridays 6pm).

5. **columnsgrid (Ministries — 3 columns)**
   Each: icon + heading + paragraph + button. Children's Ministry, Youth Group, Women's Fellowship, Men's Group, Music & Worship, Community Outreach.

6. **layout-row (Upcoming Events)**
   heading + columnsgrid (3 cols): image + heading + caption (date, time) + button ("Learn More"). Featured upcoming events.

7. **layout-row (Our Pastor)**
   Left: image (pastor / leader). Right: heading (name) + eyebrow (title) + paragraph (brief bio, vision for the community) + button ("Meet Our Team").

8. **counter-up (Community Impact)**
   "500+ Members", "12 Ministries", "20+ Community Events/Year", "15 Years Serving".

9. **carousel (Community Stories)**
   blockquote + caption (member name).

10. **layout-row (New Here?)**
    Left: heading ("What to Expect") + paragraph (casual atmosphere, children's programs, service length, parking info). Right: image (welcoming scene).

11. **form (Connect With Us)**
    textbox (name), textbox (email), textbox (phone), dropdown (I'm interested in: First Visit, Volunteering, Small Groups, Prayer Request), textarea (message), button.

12. **layout-row (Footer)**
    Address, phone, service times, social links, giving link, denomination/affiliation.

metadata.section_heading: Variant A — Church / Place of Worship

content:
**Page: Home (Single Page)**

1. **titlebar**
   Center name/logo, nav (Programs, Schedule, Membership, Events, Contact), button ("Become a Member").

2. **layout-row (Hero)**
   Left: heading ("Your Community Hub for Fun, Fitness & Learning") + paragraph (programs for all ages — sports, arts, education, events) + two buttons ("View Programs", "Membership Info"). Right: image (active community center / people enjoying programs).

3. **br (divider)**
   Visual separator.

4. **tabs (Programs by Age)**
   Tabs: Kids (5-12), Teens, Adults, Seniors. Each: columnsgrid of program cards with icon + heading + caption (schedule) + button.

5. **columnsgrid (Facilities — 3 columns)**
   Each: image + heading + paragraph. Gymnasium, Swimming Pool, Art Studio, Computer Lab, Meeting Rooms, Outdoor Fields.

6. **layout-row (Weekly Schedule)**
   heading + tabs or columnsgrid showing daily programming: class name + time + location + instructor.

7. **counter-up (Center Stats)**
   "5,000+ Members", "50+ Weekly Classes", "30 Years Serving the Community", "All Ages Welcome".

8. **layout-row (Membership Plans)**
   columnsgrid (3 cols): heading + paragraph + counter-up (price) + button. Individual, Family, Senior. Badge ("Best Value") on Family.

9. **carousel (Upcoming Events)**
   Slides: image + heading + caption (date, time) + button ("Register").

10. **carousel (Member Testimonials)**
    blockquote + caption.

11. **form (Contact / Register)**
    textbox (name), textbox (phone), textbox (email), dropdown (interest: Membership, Program Registration, Room Rental, General Inquiry), textarea (message), button.

12. **layout-row (Footer)**
    Address, phone, hours, social links, city/county affiliation.

---

metadata.section_heading: Variant B — Community Center / Recreation Hub

content:
**Page: Home (Single Page — Mission-Driven)**

1. **titlebar**
   Organization name/logo, nav (Our Mission, Programs, Volunteer, Events, Donate), button ("Volunteer Now").

2. **layout-row (Hero)**
   Full-width image (volunteers in action), overlay: heading ("Making a Difference, Together") + paragraph (mission statement — brief, inspiring) + two buttons ("Get Involved", "Donate").

3. **br (divider)**
   Visual separator.

4. **counter-up (Impact Numbers)**
   "10,000+ Volunteer Hours", "50+ Programs", "5,000 Lives Impacted", "200+ Active Volunteers".

5. **columnsgrid (Our Programs — 3 columns)**
   Each: icon + heading + paragraph + button. Food Bank, Tutoring & Mentoring, Senior Care, Habitat Builds, Environmental Cleanup, Holiday Drives.

6. **layout-row (How to Get Involved)**
   3-step: icon + heading + paragraph. "Sign Up Online" → "Attend Orientation" → "Make an Impact".

7. **carousel (Volunteer Stories)**
   image + blockquote + caption (volunteer name, program).

8. **layout-row (Upcoming Events)**
   heading + columnsgrid (3 cols): image + heading + caption (date) + button ("Sign Up").

9. **layout-row (Our Partners)**
   ticker of partner/sponsor logos.

10. **progress-bar (Fundraising Goals)**
    Current campaigns with progress bars: Food Drive (75%), Building Fund (40%), Scholarship Fund (90%).

11. **form (Sign Up to Volunteer)**
    textbox (name), textbox (email), textbox (phone), dropdown (area of interest), dropdown (availability: Weekdays, Weekends, Evenings, Flexible), textarea (skills or experience), button.

12. **layout-row (Footer)**
    Address, phone, email, social links, 501(c)(3) registration number, donation link.
